title: Portfolio Case Studies and Technical Decision Narratives · Opportunity Brief: Problem Context
summary: A project page celebrates features and tools but omits the user need, personal decisions, alternatives, failures, verification, accessibility, security, impact limits, and maintenance state. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the problem context increment in evidence-linked project case-study set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.
Verify one clean setup, core behavior, changed case, failure, and current dependency or environment boundary from the public route.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Problem Context · Theory Problem Context
steps.instruction:
theory case — A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Problem Context contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Problem Context · Theory Problem Context.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research. For Predict Problem Context · Theory Problem Context, keep Problem Context connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Problem Context condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

content.text: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research. A defensible solution applies Problem Context, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A compelling case study needs a dramatic origin story even if none occurred. This fails the Problem Context contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers (Worker resource published 2024; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Explain the affected people, decision, evidence, constraints, prior alternative, and personal authority without inventing user research.
